thought.text: 现在我需要添加 if/else/while 语句的支持：

action.new_str:
statement
    :   compoundStatement
    |   expressionStatement
    |   selectionStatement
    |   iterationStatement
    |   jumpStatement
    ;

selectionStatement
    :   If LeftParen expression RightParen statement (Else statement)?
    ;

iterationStatement
    :   While LeftParen expression RightParen statement
    ;

tool_call.name: file_editor
tool_call.arguments:
{"command": "str_replace", "path": "/workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsUParser.g4", "old_str": "statement
    :   compoundStatement
    |   expressionStatement
    |   jumpStatement
    ;", "new_str": "statement
    :   compoundStatement
    |   expressionStatement
    |   selectionStatement
    |   iterationStatement
    |   jumpStatement
    ;

selectionStatement
    :   If LeftParen expression RightParen statement (Else statement)?
    ;

iterationStatement
    :   While LeftParen expression RightParen statement
    ;"}

summary:
